data.description:
Goal:
Connect the overview stale beat rail to backend review jobs, registered-agent choices, model override input, result polling, and status summaries so users can run grooming from the overview screen.

Verification:
1. Run UI/unit tests covering payload shaping from selected stale beats, agent/model controls, and result display.
2. Run lint, typecheck, default tests, and build.

Constraints:
Keep controls compact and consistent with existing Settings/Dispatch selects. Treat selected agent/model as per-run choices in the first implementation unless a later design explicitly adds persistent grooming settings.
